summary: PR 2457 linked Yoshi's ftYs_SpecialHi.c by changing its configure.py object status from NonMatching to Matching, while also adjusting nearby ftYoshi static-data ownership: a static header was renamed from ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h, included from ftYs_SpecialS.c instead of ftYs_SpecialHi.c, an extern for ftYs_Unk3_803CED48 was removed, and several sdata2 symbols were changed from global ftYs_Init_* names to local @ labels. The automated report recorded linked-code and data progress, including one new .data match for main/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS.

key_files.role: Marks melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialHi.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk around MatchingFor object list

key_files.role: Newly linked source file; removes inclusion of ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h and adds ftYs_SpecialHi.h.
Now includes ftYs_SpecialS.static.h and drops an extern declaration for ftYs_Unk3_803CED48.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.c include and extern hunks

key_files.role: Renamed static header formerly named ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h; keeps static ftYs_Unk3_803CED48 data and removes exported ftYs_SpecialHi.h include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: rename from ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h

key_files.role: Adjusts .sdata2 symbols at 0x804D9A40-0x804D9A50 from global ftYs_Init_* names to local @ labels.

what_changed: configure.py changed ftYs_SpecialHi.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...).
ftYs_SpecialHi.c stopped including ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h and started including ftYs_SpecialHi.h.
ftYs_SpecialS.c started including ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS.static.h and removed an extern bool ftYs_Unk3_803CED48[] declaration.
The static header was renamed from ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h and no longer exports ftYs_SpecialHi.h.
symbols.txt changed four .sdata2 entries at 0x804D9A40, 0x804D9A44, 0x804D9A48, and 0x804D9A50 from global ftYs_Init_* symbols to local @222/@223/@224/@226 labels.
The automated report showed linked code +1836 bytes, matched data +116 bytes, linked data +24 bytes, and one new .data match for main/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS.
smart_moves: Kept the newly matching SpecialHi source focused by replacing a static-header include with the public ftYs_SpecialHi.h include.
Moved the private static data header to the SpecialS side where the diff indicates the static data is used, eliminating a separate extern declaration.
Adjusted symbol metadata rather than compensating in C source for the .sdata2 labels.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking a fighter file, check whether nearby static headers actually belong to a neighboring translation unit; moving the private static header to the owning source can avoid stale includes and duplicate extern declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.c adds ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS.static.h and removes extern ftYs_Unk3_803CED48
raw_diff: static header rename to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small symbol metadata changes may be part of a link/match PR when data labels need local scope rather than previously guessed global names.

naming_conventions.convention: Static headers are named after the translation unit that owns or includes the private static data, as shown by ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h being renamed to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h.
Unproven local .sdata2 constants can remain address-local @ labels rather than semantic global ftYs_Init_* names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Promote a source file from NonMatching to Matching only with accompanying metadata/include cleanup needed for the linked unit.
Use symbols.txt scope/name corrections for constants instead of source-level fake storage when matching data ownership changes are involved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt .sdata2 entries changed from global named symbols to local @ labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Private static data used by SpecialS was kept in a static header included by SpecialS, and the redundant extern declaration was removed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.c adds static header include and removes extern bool ftYs_Unk3_803CED48[]
raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.static.h contains static bool ftYs_Unk3_803CED48[]

accepted_candidate_records.title: Linking a TU may require moving private static data headers to the actual data owner
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2457, linking ftYs_SpecialHi.c coincided with renaming ftYs_SpecialHi.static.h to ftYs_SpecialS.static.h, including that static header from ftYs_SpecialS.c, and removing an extern for ftYs_Unk3_803CED48. This is evidence that static-header ownership should be checked against the translation unit that actually owns or uses the private data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.c include addition and extern removal

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer local labels for unproven local constants over guessed global names
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2457 changed several .sdata2 constants at 0x804D9A40-0x804D9A50 from global ftYs_Init_* symbols to local @ labels as part of a matching/linking PR. This supports checking symbol scope/name metadata instead of preserving broad global names when local label evidence is stronger.

rejection_notes: Do not infer a general rule that all static headers should be moved out of newly matching files; this PR only shows one ftYoshi SpecialHi/SpecialS case.
Do not claim a human reviewer requested or approved the include/header changes; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not claim exact text-section function matches beyond the configure.py Matching status and automated linked-code report; no objdiff or per-symbol match report is present in the slice.
Do not treat the bot's ftYs_SpecialS .data match as proof that ftYs_SpecialHi.c itself produced a new data match; the report names SpecialS .data.
